item.name: Pumpkin Perch
item.description:
Found in the outskirts shallows, this freshwater fish has a remarkably high reproductive rate.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: According to Tonawawtan legend, this almost frighteningly fecund fish was born from a pumpkin seed cast into the river. Attempts to recreate the fable have invariably failed to produce results.
